nocturnal_limb_movements_before.description: Nocturnal limb movements score before treatment, reported as mean (SE) across 13 patients.

nocturnal_limb_movements_during.description: Nocturnal limb movements score during treatment, reported as mean (SE) across 13 patients.

nocturnal_limb_movements_after.description: Nocturnal limb movements score after treatment, reported as mean (SE) across 13 patients.

sample_size.description: Number of patients in the study, used to convert SE to SD (SD = SE × √13).
